about.title: About Ochi Jewelry
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.p1: Ochi Jewelry was founded with a simple mission: to bring exceptional craftsmanship and timeless beauty within reach. We are a boutique jewelry house specializing in fine gold and silver pieces, as well as professional repair and restoration services.
about.p2: Every piece in our collection is carefully selected for quality. Our master jewelers bring decades of experience to every repair, restoration, and custom creation — treating each piece as if it were their own.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from clients delighted with our custom designs and repair services

items.name: Sophia Rodriguez
items.text: The absolute best jewelry store. They resized my engagement ring in under an hour. The work was flawless and the staff was very professional.

items.name: Alexander Silva
items.text: I ordered a bespoke gold chain and it exceeded all my expectations. The level of craftsmanship and detail is truly outstanding.

items.name: Elena Gomez
items.text: The gold plating and polishing service breathed new life into my grandmother's old bracelet. Fast turnaround and fair pricing.
